title: SilkTouch Patcher
description: Disable silk touch on certain blocks to workaround with faulty silk touch drops.
body:
## SilkTouchPatcher
A mod for Minecraft to disable silk touch on certain modded blocks, to fix their faulty silk touch drops.  
By default when a block is mined with silk touch and dropped nothing, it will try to drop the non-silk drops instead.  
Additional blocks can be added in config.  
Can also be used to disable silk touch on certain blocks.  
Config format:
- `modid:blockid`, or add blockstates to match:
- `modid:blockid:key1=value1,key2=value2:key1=value2`
- (multiple blockstates can be matched, separated with colons)
